title: Karuvakaatu Karuvaaya Lyrics Maruthu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Maruthu Karuvakaatu Karuvaaya Song Lyrics
Singer : Vandana Srinivasan, Jithin Raj & Jayamoorthy
Music : D. Imman
Lyrics : Vairamuthu

naan velaankaratil
molachcha mottu
un vetti eduthu
veli kattu..

thannathani maanu
iva thanniyillaa
meenu
manja thaali potta
nee mattum thaaney
aanu.

kuththamillaa ponnu
nee kutthha vachcha
thaenu.
kannukulla vachi
unna kaappathuven
naanu.

thoduththa poovukku
naar poruppu en
thuvanda selaikku
nee poruppu

izhuththa izhuppukku
naan poruppu en
iduppu valikku
nee poruppu

natchathiram ethanayo
ennikka therinjadhunu
enakku
matchcam mattum eththanayo
innamum edukkala kanakku

naan velaankaratil
molachcha mottu
un vetti eduthu
veli kattu..

paasam ulla nenjil
naan vaasam panna poraen
vaaram varum munnae
unna maasam panna poren

saamakozhi koova un
sangathikku vaaraen.
oththa pulla thandhaa
naan retta pulla tharen.

naan velaankaratil
molachcha mottu
un vetti eduthu
veli kattu..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Karuvakaatu Karuvaaya?

The song is a soothing romantic melody that conveys deep emotions and tranquility.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Jayamoorthy, Jithin Raj, and Vandhana Srinivasan.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

What is the context of the song in the movie Maruthu?

The song is set in a romantic context, highlighting the bond between the lead characters.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Karuvakaatu Karuvaaya is a melodious track from the movie Maruthu, capturing the essence of romance and tranquility. Sung by Jayamoorthy, Jithin Raj, and Vandhana Srinivasan, the song features lyrics by Vairamuthu that beautifully express love and longing. The soothing melody creates a serene atmosphere, making it perfect for moments of relaxation and reflection. The song's placement in the movie underscores the emotional connection between the lead characters, enhancing the narrative with its heartfelt rendition.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Karuvakaatu Karuvaaya from the movie Maruthu is a soothing melody that beautifully captures the essence of romance. The song features the harmonious voices of Jayamoorthy, Jithin Raj, and Vandhana Srinivasan, with lyrics penned by the legendary Vairamuthu. Dive into this enchanting musical experience that promises to evoke deep emotions and a sense of tranquility.
stanzaMeanings: Will you come with the breeze from the dark clouds all the time?
Will you give a kiss and leave me breathless?
Oh king who grew strong, come, the one who stands guard, come.
I am the bud that bloomed in the garden, take your sickle and fence it.
In your letter, seal it and pour love into my life.
Will you come with the breeze from the dark clouds all the time?
Will you give a kiss and leave me breathless?
This man is alone, like a fish without water, you alone are the man who tied the yellow thread.
You are a flawless girl, like honey from a flower. I will keep you safe in my eyes.
The string is responsible for the garland, you are responsible for my red saree.
I am responsible for the pull, you are responsible for my waist pain.
I know how to count stars, but I haven't counted the matches yet.
I am the bud that bloomed in the garden, take your sickle and fence it.
In your letter, seal it and pour love into my life.
Will you come with the breeze from the dark clouds all the time?
Will you give a kiss and leave me breathless?
I am going to live in your loving heart, before the week comes, I will make you mine for a month.
I will come to your music like a rooster crowing. If you give me one blade of grass, I will give you two.
Before mixing milk and curd, we will be together ten times.
Like buttermilk and curd, our lives will be mixed together.
I have given my life and honor to you, my leader.
For seven lifetimes, you must be my relation.
I am the bud that bloomed in the garden, take your sickle and fence it.
In your letter, seal it and pour love into my life.
Will you come with the breeze from the dark clouds?
